body:
## Summary

Fixes #1665.

This updates CI/CD change detection so metadata-only PR updates, such as the final `.gitkeep` revert in PR #1663, still produce completed checks but do not rerun expensive test jobs.

## Changes

- Removed workflow-level `pull_request.paths` from `.github/workflows/release.yml` so every PR update runs the cheap detection job.
- Changed the detect job checkout to `fetch-depth: 0` and passed PR action/before/after SHA context into `scripts/detect-code-changes.mjs`.
- Updated `scripts/detect-code-changes.mjs` so `pull_request.synchronize` compares the latest PR head update first, with a synthetic merge fallback (`HEAD^2^..HEAD^2`), while opened/reopened PRs still use the full PR diff.
- Added `.js` to positive code matching to align with the workflow's historical trigger intent.
- Made `scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh` ignore local `node_modules`, matching CI where the check runs before dependency installation.
- Added an issue #1665 regression case to `tests/test-detect-code-changes-1528.mjs`.
- Captured issue/PR/run artifacts, the screenshot, template comparison notes, and the workflow log under `docs/case-studies/issue-1665/`.
- Added a patch changeset.

## Reproduction

PR #1663 pushed commit `c3aac73b22f328b2597e94aa31c6f3561a6006b2`, which only changed `.gitkeep`. The old detector compared the full PR range and emitted `mjs=true`, `package=true`, and `code=true`, causing tests to run again.

The new regression test creates the same shape locally: a PR branch with an earlier `.mjs` code commit and a latest `.gitkeep` commit, merged as GitHub's synthetic PR merge commit. Before the fix it detects the earlier `.mjs` file; after the fix it reports `mjs=false` and `code=false`.

## Verification

```bash
node tests/test-detect-code-changes-1528.mjs
GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=pull_request GITHUB_EVENT_ACTION=synchronize GITHUB_BEFORE_SHA=e4037e18c24a13eea0bc3b94e233035611450a92 GITHUB_AFTER_SHA=c3aac73b22f328b2597e94aa31c6f3561a6006b2 node scripts/detect-code-changes.mjs
GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=pull_request GITHUB_EVENT_ACTION=synchronize GITHUB_BEFORE_SHA=05a3e42d GITHUB_AFTER_SHA=ffe4486f node scripts/detect-code-changes.mjs
npm run format:check
npm run lint
bash -n scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh && bash scripts/check-file-line-limits.sh
npm run check:duplication
npm test
```

Local note: `npm ci` completed with the expected engine warning because this container has Node 20.20.2 while the project declares Node >=24 and CI uses Node 24.

## Evidence

Case study: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/blob/issue-1665-3c9668bedbd5/docs/case-studies/issue-1665/README.md

Issue screenshot:

![Issue 1665 screenshot](https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/blob/issue-1665-3c9668bedbd5/docs/case-studies/issue-1665/assets/issue-screenshot.png?raw=true)

comments.body:
## Solution summary

Implemented and pushed the fix to PR 1668: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/1668

The PR is ready for review, no longer draft, and the latest GitHub Actions run passed: `24887339421`. Local working tree is clean on `issue-1665-3c9668bedbd5`.

Main changes:
- Removed workflow-level PR `paths` filtering so `detect-changes` always runs.
- Updated `scripts/detect-code-changes.mjs` to use the actual PR synchronize commit range, with fallbacks for GitHub synthetic merge commits.
- Added a regression test covering the “latest commit only changes `.gitkeep`” case.
- Added the issue 1665 case study artifacts under `docs/case-studies/issue-1665/`.
- Updated PR title/body with reproduction, verification, and screenshot evidence.

Verified with `npm run format:check`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, focused detector tests, line-limit checks, `git diff --check`, and GitHub CI.

Reference docs used: GitHub’s workflow path/diff behavior docs and required-check troubleshooting docs:
https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax#git-diff-comparisons
https://docs.github.com/en/pull-requests/collaborating-with-pull-requests/collaborating-on-repositories-with-code-quality-features/troubleshooting-required-status-checks

commits.messageBody:
Adding .gitkeep for PR creation (default mode).
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/issues/1665

title: Fix CI/CD change detection for metadata-only PR updates
